---
title: "Newsletter"
description: "Anticipating the Unintended — a weekly newsletter on Indian public policy"
toc: false
---

## Anticipating the Unintended

I co-write **Anticipating the Unintended** with RSJ — a weekly newsletter that makes sense of Indian public policy. Each edition takes  current issues and connects them to frameworks, history, and first principles, in about 4000 words.

We've been publishing weekly since 2019.

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:1.5rem 0;">
  <a href="https://publicpolicy.substack.com" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">Subscribe on Substack →</a>
  <a href="https://publicpolicy.substack.com/archive" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">Browse the archive →</a>
</div>
```

---

## What we cover

- Indian political economy and governance
- State capacity and institutional design
- Technology and regulation
- Foreign policy and strategic affairs
- Ideas from economics, political science, and history applied to current events
